message:
chore: bump workspace version to 0.2.28

Bump all crate versions from 0.2.27 to 0.2.28 in workspace Cargo.toml
and regenerate Cargo.lock.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
